questions.question: What syntax does defineEmits use to declare typed events with named parameters?
options: An array of event name strings
A type parameter with event names as properties and tuples as values
A plain object with event names mapping to handler functions
A generic function that accepts an event name and payload

questions.question: What happens when you call emit('typo') for an event not declared in defineEmits with TypeScript?
options: Vue logs a runtime warning in development
The event is silently ignored at runtime
A TypeScript compile-time error is thrown
The parent receives undefined as the payload

questions.question: Which syntax enables runtime validation in addition to TypeScript type checking for emits?
options: Passing a type parameter to defineEmits<{}>
The object syntax with validation functions returning boolean
